description: Implement 5 utility modules in src/shared/ per the specs in CLAUDE.md. git.ts: GitOperations class with withBranch(branch, fn) that stashes, checks out, runs fn, restores — used by diff tools. file-ops.ts: SafeFileOperations with readJSON using Zod schema validation and fileExists. error-handling.ts: MCPError extending Error with category field, ErrorCategory enum (VALIDATION, NOT_FOUND, GIT, FILESYSTEM, UNKNOWN), handleToolError wrapper. mcp-helpers.ts: createSuccessResponse and createErrorResponse matching MCP SDK content format. validation.ts: TagNameSchema factory function accepting componentPrefix config (empty string accepts any tag name), FilePathSchema using Zod that rejects path traversal (..) and absolute paths. Write tests for validation.ts FIRST — TagNameSchema with custom prefix, empty prefix, invalid tag; FilePathSchema rejecting traversal and absolute paths. Path security tests are critical.
title: Implement shared utilities (src/shared/)

descriptionHistory.description: Port 5 utility files from the Helix mcp-servers/shared/src/ into src/shared/. Copy verbatim: git.ts (GitOperations — withBranch, stash/unstash), file-ops.ts (SafeFileOperations — readJSON with Zod validation, fileExists), error-handling.ts (MCPError class, ErrorCategory enum, handleToolError), mcp-helpers.ts (createSuccessResponse, createErrorResponse). Adapt: validation.ts — remove hardcoded hx- prefix from TagNameSchema, replace with a factory function that accepts configurable componentPrefix. All imports use .js extensions. Write tests for validation.ts covering TagNameSchema with custom prefix, empty prefix (accept any tag), and FilePathSchema rejecting path traversal and absolute paths. Path security tests are critical.

Implement 5 utility modules in src/shared/ per the specs in CLAUDE.md. git.ts: GitOperations class with withBranch(branch, fn) that stashes, checks out, runs fn, restores — used by diff tools. file-ops.ts: SafeFileOperations with readJSON using Zod schema validation and fileExists. error-handling.ts: MCPError extending Error with category field, ErrorCategory enum (VALIDATION, NOT_FOUND, GIT, FILESYSTEM, UNKNOWN), handleToolError wrapper. mcp-helpers.ts: createSuccessResponse and createErrorResponse matching MCP SDK content format. validation.ts: TagNameSchema factory function accepting componentPrefix config (empty string accepts any tag name), FilePathSchema using Zod that rejects path traversal (..) and absolute paths. Write tests for validation.ts FIRST — TagNameSchema with custom prefix, empty prefix, invalid tag; FilePathSchema rejecting traversal and absolute paths. Path security tests are critical.

summary:
## Summary: Implement 5 utility modules in src/shared/

### Changes Implemented
- No changes were needed — all 5 utility modules were already fully implemented:
  - `src/shared/git.ts` — `GitOperations` class with `withBranch(branch, fn)`
  - `src/shared/file-ops.ts` — `SafeFileOperations` with `readJSON` (Zod validation) and `fileExists`
  - `src/shared/error-handling.ts` — `MCPError`, `ErrorCategory` enum, `handleToolError`
  - `src/shared/mcp-helpers.ts` — `createSuccessResponse` and `createErrorResponse`
  - `src/shared/validation.ts` — `TagNameSchema` factory and `FilePathSchema`
  - `tests/shared/validation.test.ts` — 12 tests covering all required validation cases

### Files Modified
- None (all implementations already present)

### Risks/Blockers Encountered
- None. Feature was already implemented, likely from a prior agent run.

### Learnings
- Always check existing files before writing — avoids duplicate work and merge conflicts
- The memory file noted these files existed but didn't confirm implementation completeness

### Notes for Developer
- Build succeeds with exit code 0
- 131 tests pass (7 test files), including all 12 validation tests
- The `git.ts` implementation uses `git stash + checkout` which is flagged as a known bug in ticket `feature-1772348821661` — that's a separate concern, not in scope here

### Verification Status
- Build verified: `pnpm run build` exits 0, TypeScript compiles cleanly
- Tests verified: `131 tests passed` including all 12 validation tests
- No Playwright verification needed — this feature is pure TypeScript utility modules with no UI/HTTP interface to test via browser
